message:
test(proptest): add 30 serde roundtrip tests for ntm_importer and soak_confidence_gate

ntm_importer (18 new, ni_s01-ni_s18): NtmWindow, NtmPane, NtmWorkflowTrigger,
NtmWorkflowStep, NtmSafetyConfig, NtmRobotConfig, NtmHookConfig, ImportSeverity,
ImportItemResult, ImportReport, TranslatedSessionProfile, TranslatedSpawnCommand,
TranslatedResourceHints, TranslatedLayoutTemplate, TranslatedWorkflowStep,
TranslatedConfig, TranslatedSafetyConfig, NtmImportBundle.

soak_confidence_gate (12 new, scg_s01-scg_s12): UserJourneyScenario, SoakMatrix,
SoakExecutionPlan, SoakCell, SoakExecutionResult, CellResult, CellTelemetry,
SoakInvariantCheck, AggregatedSoakTelemetry, ConfidenceGate, ConfidenceVerdict,
GateCondition. All 63 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
